speaker: Argo
text: Should I invite Lord Scheat...?

speaker: Argo
text: It’s so nice and warm, isn’t it Lord Scheat? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Yes, once again the water feels quite pleasant. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What did you do today? 🐾

speaker: Scheat
text: Nothing.

speaker: Argo
text: That’s… it?

speaker: Scheat
text: I simply passed the hours away in complete idleness. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: *A sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I-I see... My friend Oscar is writing a novel, you know.

speaker: Scheat
text: A novel?

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah. He’s amazing. He even won a prize for his writing!

speaker: Scheat
text: Hmmm...

speaker: Argo
text: Why don’t you try writing a novel or something yourself since you have so much free time? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: "Novels, hm...?"

speaker: Argo
text: That doesn’t sound fun to you? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: It sounds interesting, but... anything I write will be read with prejudiced eyes.

speaker: Scheat
text: Because of my name, it will be held in high regard no matter the quality... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Then why don’t you use a pen name?

speaker: Scheat
text: Hm? A what?

speaker: Argo
text: Well... You already know Professor Celio was a novelist, right?

speaker: Scheat
text: You mean the series about the travelling knight? I have not read them, but I am aware of it. *

speaker: Argo
text: He wrote them under a different name to keep himself hidden. That’s a what a pen name is.

speaker: Scheat
text: ! I see... It is like wearing a mask? *

speaker: Argo
text: You could pretend to be a mortal and send it in under a pen name. That way they won't judge it based on your real name.

speaker: Scheat
text: Hm... Sounds like quite an amusing little game. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Right! Then perhaps I will give it a try soon! *excited gesture*

speaker: Argo
text: I’m looking forward to it. *sigh*
